designDNA.concept: Festive Gujarati minimal elegance — a warm cream-and-gold wedding identity rooted in cultural reverence and modern restraint, where sacred motifs (ॐ, marigolds, diyas) are rendered through pure CSS and refined typography rather than heavy ornamentation.
designDNA.tone: Festive yet refined — celebratory warmth balanced with editorial restraint; devotional undertones expressed through glowing sacred symbols and poetic italic copy, never loud or overdecorated.
designDNA.community: Modern non-religious Gujarati — culturally rooted with Ganesh invocation and traditional ceremony references (garba, baraat, mehendi, pheras), yet presented through a contemporary minimal-elegant lens for an English-speaking diaspora audience.
designDNA.styleDirection: Minimal elegant with festive cultural accents — asymmetric editorial grid, oversized gradient name typography, frosted-glass surface treatments, ambient radial glow depth layers, and restrained dot-grid texture. No photography dependency; all richness is typographic and CSS-native.
visualMotifs: ॐ Om symbol as sacred invocation badge
✦ and ◆ star/diamond glyphs as floating petal particles
❋ floral ornamental repeaters in header/footer bands
Vertical ornamental side pillars with dot–line–diamond rhythm
Dot-grid radial background pattern in gold and maroon
Marigold/diya/music emoji as cultural celebration icons
Maroon-to-gold gradient text fill on display names
Frosted-glass pill surfaces with gold border and inner highlight
Radial ambient corner glows in gold-left / maroon-right
Horizontal ornamental bands (top + bottom) with fade-line flanking centered text
Ampersand in italic serif as couple connector motif
Staggered bride/groom name alignment (left-offset bride, right-offset groom)
designDNA.textureStyle: Warm cream base with a subtle dual-frequency dot-grid overlay (gold at 48px, maroon at 96px, both at low opacity). Ambient radial ellipse glows in corners create soft depth without imagery. Frosted-glass surfaces use backdrop-filter blur with semi-transparent cream-to-gold-pale gradients and bright inner-top highlight strokes.
designDNA.shadowStyle: Layered and warm-toned: primary shadows use rgba(123,30,53,0.35) maroon depth for buttons, rgba(201,151,58,0.12–0.15) gold warmth for surface cards, and inset rgba(255,255,255,0.8–0.9) top-edge highlights for frosted-glass lift. No cold grey or neutral shadows anywhere.

preferredAnimations: slow radial glow pulse (6–7s ease-in-out infinite alternate)
floating petal drift with opacity fade (8s ease-in-out infinite)
gentle vertical float for celebration icons (3s ease-in-out infinite alternate)
Om symbol text-shadow glow breathe (4s ease-in-out infinite alternate)
CTA button shimmer sweep on hover (left-to-right pseudo-element, 0.45s)
translateY(-2px) lift on button hover with box-shadow deepen

designDNA.layoutPersonality: Three-column editorial grid with narrow decorative side pillars flanking a wide dominant center column — collapses to single-column on mobile. Center content stacks vertically with generous gap rhythm (28px between major blocks). Top and bottom ornamental bands frame the full-bleed section. Max-width container at 1280px with symmetric horizontal padding. Typography drives hierarchy; decorative elements are structural, not supplemental.
sectionRules: Maintain the warm cream (#FAF5EC) background as the base — never switch to white, dark, or cool-toned backgrounds
Always use the maroon (#7B1E35) to gold (#C9973A) gradient system for primary display text and key accents
Preserve the gold (#C9973A) as the dominant accent for borders, lines, labels, and ornamental glyphs
Use Rozha One for all display/hero-scale headings; Cormorant Garamond italics for poetic or descriptive body passages
Use Manrope for all UI labels, captions, badges, and CTA text with wide letter-spacing (0.18em–0.25em) and uppercase treatment
Frosted-glass pill/card surfaces must use the cream-to-gold-pale gradient with gold border and white inset highlight — no flat white cards
Buttons: primary = maroon gradient fill with gold-pale text; ghost = transparent with maroon border — maintain this two-button CTA pattern
All shadows must be warm-toned (maroon or gold rgba) — no neutral grey shadows
Include at least one cultural Gujarati motif per section (ॐ, floral glyph, diya, marigold, garba reference, or ornamental band)
Ornamental horizontal bands with fade-lines flanking centered uppercase motif text must frame section tops or bottoms where appropriate
Floating particle or ambient glow animations must remain subtle (opacity max 0.45, slow timing 6s+)
Maintain the dot-grid background texture at low opacity as a unifying background layer across sections
Side decorative columns (dot–line–diamond vertical rhythm) can appear in wider layouts but must hide on mobile
Never introduce photography, image backgrounds, or external asset dependencies — all richness must be CSS-native
Avoid cold colors, dark backdrops, neon accents, sans-serif-only typographic sections, or flat minimalism stripped of cultural warmth
